reasoning: As of October 26, 2025, there is no evidence that Victor Ponta is a candidate for the Bucharest mayoral by-election scheduled for December 7, 2025. Ponta explicitly stated in May 2025 that he would not run for this position. Major political parties, including his former party PSD, have identified other candidates such as Gabriela Firea, Daniel Băluță, Ciprian Ciucu, and Cătălin Drulă. Polling from October 2025 does not include Ponta among the top contenders. Furthermore, on the cutoff date, Ponta was reported to be involved in legislative negotiations for other parties rather than campaigning for Mayor of Bucharest. Thus, the probability of him winning is negligible.
